Definition: Abbreviated weekday name in the current locale on this platform.
Full weekday name in the current locale.
Abbreviated month name in the current locale on this platform. Case-insensitive on input.
Full month name in the current locale. Case-insensitive on input.
Day of the month as decimal number (01-31).
Hours as decimal number (00-23). As a special exception strings such as ??24:00:00?? are accepted for input.
Day of year (Julian) as decimal number (001-366): For input, 366 is only valid in a leap year.
AM/PM indicator in the locale. Used in conjunction with %I and not with %H. For input the match is case-insensitive.
Weekday as a decimal number (1-7, Monday is 1).
